description: Assign the group s to the nodes of the geometric set that fall within the range. Use of the group logic is described in Groups . This command may take the form geometry node group "slotname = groupname" — quotation marks required, spaces at equals sign ignored — where slotname is the slot assignment and groupname is the group name. If the set keyword is not given, then the current set is used.

keywords.name: remove
keywords.description: Remove s from all nodes. If no slot was specified, then the group will be removed from all slots it is found in.

keywords.name: slot
keywords.description: Set group slot slot to s . By default, slot Default is used.
